column5: Address: 28 No.6 Street, Bay Hien Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

column1: Terms & Conditions
1. Type of Goods
Rates are applicable to General Cargo shipments only

Adherence to all laws and regulations relating to restricted articles and dangerous goods remain entirely the responsibility of the sender at all times. All items may be subject to customs inspection which may require additional days.
2. Duty, Tax
Any duties and taxes incurred will be will be payable by recipient at destination
US duties will be temporarily estimated in the SG LINK system. Any difference will be refunded or charged to the customer.
3. Maximum Dimention
Maximum length: 60 cm; (L + W + H) must not exceed 90cm. Minimum size of 9 cm x 14 cm.
4. Maximum Weight
Maximum weight: 5.0 kg
5. Shipment Charges
If the ratio of volumetric weight to actual weight is greater than 1.3, the shipment will be charged based on the volumetric weight. Otherwise, the actual weight will be used for billing purposes.
Volumetric weight = length (cm) * height (cm) * width (cm)/ 5000
6. Pick-up
Pick-up will be free for sending 10 parcels one time. If below 10, additional charge will be VND 50,000 per time
7. Remote Area surcharges:
<Dependant on country specific proposal, if applicable>
8. Labelling
Parcels must be labelled with the label provided by SG LINK system or Ebay system.
All other operation processes will be discussed separately
9. Documentation
Customer is required to produce all necessary documents to facilitate the custom clearance at destination

Each parcel have to be accompanied by an invoice, broker's label and destination manifest format for custom clearance purposes Non-conformity may generate delays and additional charges and possibly fines from Customs & Border Protection authorities
10. Permit Charges
Rates are exclusive of any permit charges or any Customs Documentation form, if required.
11. Undeliverables
Additional charges will be applicable for re-delivery or change of delivery addresses SG LINK will charge a “Return to Sender” fee at the outbound rate
12. Compensation
Maximum compensation is VND 1,150,000 per shipment or declared value, whichever is lower respectively.
13. Other Charges

Any incidental charges incurred will be charged separately, ie, POD, translation, storage, inspection charges etc Any value-added services will be charged separately, i.e. insurance, packaging, COD etc

Additional charges will be applicable if Operations are triggered during weekends & public holidays Additional charges will be applicable if shipments are not adhered to the requirements and standards
14.  Transit Time
Delivery times are estimates only, any delay at origin or destination is beyond the control of SG LINK.
The indicative transit times are not binding and do not form part of the contract. Shipper agrees to all routing and diversion.
15. Foreign Exchange Fluctuations
SG LINK reserves the right to review the rates should the exchange rates fluctuates more than 3% from the existing benchmark on the last business day of each month
16. Notice Period
Pricing and service capability are subject to review and adjustment.
